inputs.title: Fix crash on empty webhook payload
inputs.description: Connector webhook handler throws when body is empty; return 400 and log a structured skip reason.

rubric.criterion: Documents reproduction with empty payload and expected HTTP status.
Identifies parse/site of failure before code change.
